title: Apprise Notification Step
description: Send notifications using Apprise with Jinja2 variable substitution support. Supports custom JSON templates (e.g., Microsoft Adaptive Cards), Jinja2 variables in the URL, and custom tokens via :key=value URL parameters.

apprise_url.title: Apprise URL
apprise_url.description: The Apprise notification URL (e.g., gotify://token/url, slack://webhook, workflows://, or direct Power Automate URLs). Supports Jinja2 variable substitution - use {{ state.outputs.<key> }} to inject Terraform outputs. Use :key=value syntax to define custom template tokens (e.g., :target={{ state.outputs.owner }}). Available Jinja2 variables: workflow_name, run_id, run_url, status, triggered_by, step_name, step_status, state.outputs.<key>

use_template.title: Use Template Mode
use_template.description: Enable to use a custom JSON template (e.g., Microsoft Adaptive Cards) for the notification instead of standard title/body fields.

template.title: Template JSON
template.description: JSON template for the notification (e.g., Microsoft Adaptive Cards). Supports two token types: (1) Jinja2: {{ workflow_name }}, {{ state.outputs.x }}, {{ target }} - processed before sending; (2) Apprise: {{ app_title }}, {{ app_body }}, {{ app_id }}, {{ app_desc }}, {{ app_color }}, {{ app_type }}, {{ app_image_url }}, {{ app_url }} - processed by Apprise. Custom tokens like {{ target }} come from URL :key=value parameters.

title.title: Notification Title
title.description: Title for the notification. Supports Jinja2 variable substitution ({{ workflow_name }}, {{ state.outputs.x }}, etc.) and Markdown formatting. This field is required when not using template mode.

body.title: Notification Body
body.description: Body of the notification. Supports Jinja2 variable substitution and Markdown formatting (bold, italic, lists, code, links). This field is required when not using template mode.
